overrides.override_summary: Forum selection provision requiring litigation outside California may be unenforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchisee may be able to litigate in California instead of Virginia

overrides.override_summary: Choice of New York law may be unenforceable under California law
overrides.why_it_matters: California franchise law may apply instead of New York law

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages may be unenforceable if inconsistent with Civil Code Section 1671
overrides.why_it_matters: Substantial LD exposure ($1.2M+ for 121-room hotel) may be voided

overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete unenforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: Not material here since FA has no post-term noncompete, but confirms CA protection

overrides.override_summary: Release must exclude claims under CA Franchise Investment Law and Franchise Relations Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains right to assert CA franchise law claims despite general release

overrides.override_summary: General release shall not relieve franchisor from liability under Hawaii franchising laws
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains Hawaii franchise law claims despite release language

overrides.override_summary: Venue/jurisdiction/choice of law provisions do not waive Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act rights
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchisee retains all IL Act rights regardless of VA venue clause

overrides.override_summary: IL Franchise Disclosure Act applies to IL franchisees; New York law subject to IL Act
overrides.why_it_matters: IL franchise protections override any conflicting NY law provisions

overrides.override_summary: General release does not relieve liability under MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisee retains franchise law claims despite release

overrides.override_summary: Maryland law may supersede FA termination and renewal provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchisee may have stronger termination/renewal protections

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may sue in Maryland for claims under MD law; 3-year statute of limitations
overrides.why_it_matters: Can bring MD franchise law claims in MD courts

overrides.override_summary: Cannot terminate without good cause; 30 days cure required
overrides.why_it_matters: Stronger termination protections; not all FA termination triggers may constitute 'good cause'

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require arbitration or litigation outside Michigan
overrides.why_it_matters: VA venue clause void for MI franchisees at arbitration

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require release/waiver that deprives franchisee of MI Act rights
overrides.why_it_matters: Release on transfer/re-licensing cannot waive MI franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination (60 days cure); 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Much longer cure periods than FA standard (10-30 days). Significant additional protection.

overrides.override_summary: All liquidated damages provisions deleted entirely. Replaced with actual damages standard.
overrides.why_it_matters: Eliminates the $1.2M+ LD floor. Franchisor must prove actual damages.

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require litigation outside Minnesota
overrides.why_it_matters: VA venue clause does not apply to MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Release does not relieve liability under MN franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise protections survive release

overrides.override_summary: Release language does not relieve liability under NY franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law protections survive general release

overrides.override_summary: All liquidated damages provisions deleted entirely
overrides.why_it_matters: Eliminates LD exposure; franchisor must prove actual damages

overrides.override_summary: ND law supersedes; FA governed by ND law, not NY
overrides.why_it_matters: Full ND franchise protections apply

overrides.override_summary: All out-of-state venue/jurisdiction provisions deleted
overrides.why_it_matters: Must litigate in ND

overrides.override_summary: All disputes resolved by mandatory arbitration (AAA/JAMS). Venue Fairfax County, VA; seat New York.
overrides.why_it_matters: Mandatory arbitration replaces litigation; Federal Arbitration Act governs

overrides.override_summary: Release does not apply to RI Franchise Investment Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchise law claims survive release

overrides.override_summary: Out-of-state venue and choice of law void for RI Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Can litigate RI Act claims in RI under RI law

overrides.override_summary: Cannot cancel franchise without reasonable cause under VA Retail Franchising Act
overrides.why_it_matters: Not all FA termination triggers may meet VA 'reasonable cause' standard

overrides.override_summary: RCW 19.100.180 may supersede FA termination/renewal provisions
overrides.why_it_matters: WA statutory protections may provide stronger termination/renewal rights

overrides.override_summary: Release excludes WA Act claims unless negotiated settlement with independent counsel after FA is in effect
overrides.why_it_matters: Release on transfer/re-licensing cannot waive WA franchise law rights

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete covenant void unless employee earns >$100K/year (adjusted); independent contractors >$250K
overrides.why_it_matters: Not directly applicable to franchisee (no post-term noncompete in FA), but protects hotel employees

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation must be in WA or mutually agreed. Litigation may be brought in WA.
overrides.why_it_matters: VA venue clause limited; WA franchisee can bring WA Act claims in WA
